user.title: Set up FileTrack
user.description: Click Submit to enable FileTrack. Then use the Configure menu to add sensors.

abort.already_configured: FileTrack is already added. Use the Configure menu to add sensors.

remove_sensor.title: Remove sensors
remove_sensor.description:
Select the sensor(s) you wish to remove.

*NOTE: Sensors in configuration.yaml must be removed from the file.*

confirm.title: Confirm removal
confirm.description:
You are about to permanently remove the following sensor(s):

**{names}**

error.no_selection: Please select at least one sensor to remove.

abort.no_sensors: There are no sensors to remove.
